question: Andaman And Nicobar Islands ke rural locations mein jahan total households ki sankhya total occupied residential houses se zyada hai, un locations ka naam, state aur district dikha do. Results ko total households ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.LOCATION_TYPE = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) > SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES) ORDER BY SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.location_name, dim_geography_hierarchy.state, dim_geography_hierarchy.district 
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy 
JOIN fact_housing ON dim_geography_hierarchy.hierarchy_id = fact_housing.hierarchy_id 
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' 
AND dim_geography_hierarchy.location_type ILIKE 'rural' 
AND fact_housing.number_of_households > fact_housing.number_of_occupied_residential_houses 
ORDER BY fact_housing.number_of_households DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.location_name, dim_geography_hierarchy.state, dim_geography_hierarchy.district

question: India ke liye aur census year 1991 ke liye, un top 10 districts ko list karo jinki total population zero se zyada hai, aur unki calculated household density—jo ki households ki sankhya ka total population se bhag kar nikala gaya hai—ko highest to lowest order mein density ke hisaab se arrange karo.

SELECT district, (fh.number_of_households / fpc.total_population) AS density 
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh 
JOIN fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id 
JOIN fact_population_core fpc ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fpc.hierarchy_id 
WHERE dgh.country = 'India' AND fh.census_year = 1991 AND fpc.census_year = 1991 AND fpc.total_population > 0 
ORDER BY density DESC 
LIMIT 10;

question: Location name, state, aur district dikhaiye, saath hi total male scheduled caste population aur total female scheduled caste population un areas ke liye jahan households ki sankhya occupied residential houses se zyada ho, aur yeh ensure karein ki kam se kam ek housing record maujood ho; results ko location name, state, aur district ke hisaab se group karein aur unhe total male scheduled caste population ke descending order mein arrange karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T3.MALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION), SUM(T3.FEMALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION_SOCIAL_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T3.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS > T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES GROUP BY T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSING_ID) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T3.MALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dgh.location_name, 
    dgh.state, 
    dgh.district, 
    SUM(fpsc.male_scheduled_caste_population) AS total_male_scheduled_caste_population, 
    SUM(fpsc.female_scheduled_caste_population) AS total_female_scheduled_caste_population
FROM 
    dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN 
    fact_population_social_category fpsc ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fpsc.hierarchy_id
JOIN 
    fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
WHERE 
    fh.number_of_households > fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses
GROUP BY 
    dgh.location_name, 
    dgh.state, 
    dgh.district
ORDER BY 
    total_male_scheduled_caste_population DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dgh.location_name, 
    dgh.state, 
    dgh.district, 
    SUM(fpsc.male_scheduled_caste_population) AS total_male_scheduled_caste_population, 
    SUM(fpsc.female_scheduled_caste_population) AS total_female_scheduled_caste_population
FROM 
    dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN 
    fact_population_social_category fpsc ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fpsc.hierarchy_id
JOIN 
    fact_housing fh ON dgh.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id
WHERE 
    fh.number_of_households > fh.number_of_occupied_residential_houses
GROUP BY 
    dgh.location_name, 
    dgh.state, 
    dgh.district
ORDER BY 
    total_male_scheduled_caste_population DESC;
